description: Formatted WHERE and SELECT output tests for ClickHouse

tests.name: paren_forced_or_under_and_multi_line_body
tests.expected_unformatted_sql: a = 1 AND (b = 2 OR count = 3 AND status = 4)
tests.expected_formatted_sql:
a = 1
AND (
  b = 2
  OR count = 3 AND status = 4
)

tests.name: not_multi_line_body
tests.expected_formatted_sql:
NOT (
  a = 1 AND b = 2
  OR count = 3
)

tests.name: motivating_example
tests.input: a = 1 and b = 2 or (count = 3 and (status = 4 and price = 5)) and not message
tests.expected_unformatted_sql: a = 1 AND b = 2 OR count = 3 AND status = 4 AND price = 5 AND (message IS NULL OR message = '')
tests.expected_formatted_sql:
a = 1 AND b = 2
OR count = 3
AND status = 4 AND price = 5
AND (message IS NULL OR message = '')

tests.name: deep_nesting
tests.input: a = 1 and (b = 2 or (count = 3 and (status = 4 or price = 5)))
tests.expected_unformatted_sql: a = 1 AND (b = 2 OR count = 3 AND (status = 4 OR price = 5))
tests.expected_formatted_sql:
a = 1
AND (
  b = 2
  OR count = 3
  AND (status = 4 OR price = 5)
)

tests.name: nested_indent_depth_2
tests.input: a = 1 and (status = 2 or not (count = 3 and price = 4 or active = true))
tests.expected_unformatted_sql: a = 1 AND (status = 2 OR NOT (count = 3 AND price = 4 OR active = true))
tests.expected_formatted_sql:
a = 1
AND (
  status = 2
  OR NOT (
    count = 3 AND price = 4
    OR active = true
  )
)

tests.name: nested_indent_depth_2_tabs
tests.input: a = 1 and (status = 2 or not (count = 3 and price = 4 or active = true))
tests.expected_unformatted_sql: a = 1 AND (status = 2 OR NOT (count = 3 AND price = 4 OR active = true))
tests.expected_formatted_sql:
a = 1
AND (
	status = 2
	OR NOT (
		count = 3 AND price = 4
		OR active = true
	)
)

tests.name: custom_indent_spaces_four
tests.expected_unformatted_sql: a = 1 AND (b = 2 OR count = 3 AND status = 4)
tests.expected_formatted_sql:
a = 1
AND (
    b = 2
    OR count = 3 AND status = 4
)

tests.name: indent_negative_clamps_to_zero
tests.expected_unformatted_sql: a = 1 AND (b = 2 OR count = 3 AND status = 4)
tests.expected_formatted_sql:
a = 1
AND (
b = 2
OR count = 3 AND status = 4
)

tests.name: select_with_aliases
tests.input: message as msg, count as total
tests.expected_unformatted_sql: message AS msg, count AS total
tests.expected_formatted_sql:
message AS msg,
  count AS total
